namespaces.owned_store: advisory proposal records, versions, workflow events, approvals, memo state, cockpit acknowledgements
advisory copilot runs, reviews, evidence packets, and idempotency records
policy evaluation records, catalog state, audit events, and idempotency records
advisory workspace sessions, saved versions, audit events, and idempotency evidence

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: creates additive proposal tables before Postgres-backed proposal runtime receives traffic

lock_behavior.required_operator_control: run before traffic shift or during maintenance window

rollback.limitations: do not edit applied SQL; redeploy previous compatible app or add a new forward migration

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds simulation idempotency state without changing existing proposal reads

lock_behavior.required_operator_control: run before enabling simulation idempotency persistence

backfill.quarantine_strategy: disable new simulation persistence traffic until migration succeeds

rollback.limitations: previous app version ignores the additive table

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds lifecycle origin columns with defaults/nullability that keep older proposal code compatible

lock_behavior.required_operator_control: validate table size in non-production before production apply

backfill.quarantine_strategy: halt cutover if column apply exceeds rollout window

rollback.limitations: older app versions ignore the additive columns

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds async runtime columns and recovery index while preserving existing async operation fields

lock_behavior.online_behavior: not_concurrent; schedule controlled window for existing large tables
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: rehearse with production-like row counts before production apply

backfill.quarantine_strategy: keep async recovery workers disabled until migration verifies

rollback.limitations: do not drop new columns or index during rollback; redeploy previous app or forward-fix

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds uniqueness enforcement for populated async idempotency keys without changing null-key records

lock_behavior.online_behavior: not_concurrent; requires low-write or maintenance window
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: preflight duplicate idempotency-key scan before production apply

backfill.quarantine_strategy: quarantine duplicate idempotency rows before applying index

rollback.limitations: unique index remains in place after app rollback

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds read-path indexes for proposal listing without changing API shape

lock_behavior.online_behavior: not_concurrent; schedule controlled window for existing large tables
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: rehearse index duration with production-like proposal row count

backfill.quarantine_strategy: hold traffic shift if index build breaches rehearsal budget

rollback.limitations: indexes are additive and remain after app rollback

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds memo tables and memo read indexes before memo persistence is enabled

lock_behavior.online_behavior: metadata_only_when_tables_absent; indexes build before memo traffic
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: apply before enabling memo endpoints on Postgres runtime

backfill.quarantine_strategy: keep memo persistence disabled until migration verifies

rollback.limitations: older app versions ignore additive memo tables

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds cockpit acknowledgement tables without affecting existing proposal workflows

lock_behavior.online_behavior: metadata_only_when_tables_absent; indexes build before acknowledgement traffic
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: apply before enabling cockpit acknowledgement persistence

backfill.quarantine_strategy: keep acknowledgement writes disabled until migration verifies

rollback.limitations: older app versions ignore additive acknowledgement tables

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds lifecycle history read indexes without changing workflow event or approval schemas

lock_behavior.online_behavior: not_concurrent; schedule controlled window for existing large tables
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: rehearse index duration with production-like workflow history volume

backfill.quarantine_strategy: hold rollout if index build breaches rehearsal budget

rollback.limitations: indexes are additive and remain after app rollback

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: validates proposal lifecycle ownership, unique version identity, bounded workflow vocabularies, and related-version references before repository append-only hardening

lock_behavior.online_behavior: not_concurrent; validation scans existing proposal lifecycle tables and may block conflicting writes
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: run during a controlled migration window after checking for orphan or duplicate proposal lifecycle records

backfill.quarantine_strategy: quarantine proposal lifecycle writes if orphan records, duplicate proposal_version_id values, invalid states, or invalid related-version references are reported

rollback.limitations: constraints and unique index are additive; rollback requires forward data remediation rather than dropping lifecycle integrity guarantees

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds copilot run, review, and idempotency state before copilot persistence is enabled

lock_behavior.online_behavior: metadata_only_when_tables_absent; indexes build before copilot traffic
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: apply before enabling advisory copilot Postgres writes

backfill.quarantine_strategy: keep copilot writes disabled until migration verifies

rollback.limitations: older app versions ignore additive copilot tables

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds evidence packet state before evidence packet read/write traffic is shifted

lock_behavior.online_behavior: metadata_only_when_table_absent; indexes build before evidence-packet traffic
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: apply before enabling evidence packet persistence

backfill.quarantine_strategy: keep evidence packet writes disabled until migration verifies

rollback.limitations: older app versions ignore additive evidence packet table

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds version pagination indexes without changing copilot run schema or response contracts

lock_behavior.online_behavior: not_concurrent; schedule controlled window for existing copilot run volume
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: rehearse expression index duration with production-like copilot history

backfill.quarantine_strategy: hold rollout if expression index build breaches rehearsal budget

rollback.limitations: indexes are additive and remain after app rollback

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds policy evaluation and catalog state before policy Postgres repositories receive traffic

lock_behavior.online_behavior: metadata_only_when_tables_absent; indexes build before policy traffic
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: apply before enabling policy evaluation or catalog Postgres writes

backfill.quarantine_strategy: keep policy writes disabled until migration verifies

rollback.limitations: older app versions ignore additive policy tables when policy writes remain disabled

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: replaces the ineffective policy-pack active-version index with a one-active-version invariant per policy_pack_id

lock_behavior.online_behavior: not_concurrent; fails safely if duplicate ACTIVE rows exist before the unique index is installed
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: preflight duplicate ACTIVE rows by policy_pack_id before production apply

backfill.resume_strategy: resolve duplicate ACTIVE rows to one current version and rerun migration
backfill.quarantine_strategy: halt policy-pack activation traffic until duplicate active rows are resolved

rollback.limitations: corrected active-version uniqueness remains after app rollback; fix forward if operator remediation is needed

compatibility_window.consumer_contract: adds workspace session, saved-version, audit-event, and idempotency tables before workspace Postgres repositories receive traffic

lock_behavior.online_behavior: metadata_only_when_tables_absent; indexes build before workspace traffic
lock_behavior.required_operator_control: apply before enabling workspace Postgres runtime writes

backfill.quarantine_strategy: keep workspace runtime traffic disabled until migration verifies

rollback.limitations: older app versions ignore additive workspace tables; redeploy the previous compatible app only after routing workspace traffic to a compatible runtime posture
